title: fagonia californica subsp. longipes
intro: Fagonia californica subsp. longipes, also known as California bryony, is a plant species that belongs to the family Nyctaginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits associated with Fagonia californica subsp. longipes include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
